verses.latin_vulgate: Audite, cæli, quæ loquor :  audiat terra verba oris mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֲזִ֥ינוּ הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וַאֲדַבֵּ֑רָה וְתִשְׁמַ֥ע הָאָ֖רֶץ אִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear, O ye heavens, the things I speak, let the earth give ear to the words of my mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuulkaat te taivaat, minä puhun, ja maa kuulkaan minun suuni sanoja.
verses.king_james: Give ear, O ye heavens, and I will speak; and hear, O earth, the words of my mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concrescat ut pluvia doctrina mea,  fluat ut ros eloquium meum,  quasi imber super herbam,  et quasi stillæ super gramina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַעֲרֹ֤ף כַּמָּטָר֙ לִקְחִ֔י תִּזַּ֥ל כַּטַּ֖ל אִמְרָתִ֑י כִּשְׂעִירִ֣ם עֲלֵי־דֶ֔שֶׁא וְכִרְבִיבִ֖ים עֲלֵי־עֵֽשֶׂב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let my doctrine gather as the rain, let my speech distil as the dew, as a shower upon the herb, and as drops upon the grass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun oppini tiukkukaan niinkuin sade, minun puheeni vuotakaan niinkuin kaste, niinkuin sade vihannon päälle ja niinkuin pisarat ruohon päälle.
verses.king_james: My doctrine shall drop as the rain, my speech shall distil as the dew, as the small rain upon the tender herb, and as the showers upon the grass:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia nomen Domini invocabo :  date magnificentiam Deo nostro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י שֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶקְרָ֑א הָב֥וּ גֹ֖דֶל לֵאלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because I will invoke the name of the Lord: give ye magnificence to our God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä ylistän Herran nimeä: antakaat meidän Jumalallemme suuri kunnia.
verses.king_james: Because I will publish the name of the Lord: ascribe ye greatness unto our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dei perfecta sunt opera,  et omnes viæ ejus judicia :  Deus fidelis, et absque ulla iniquitate,  justus et rectus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַצּוּר֙ תָּמִ֣ים פׇּֽעֳל֔וֹ כִּ֥י כׇל־דְּרָכָ֖יו מִשְׁפָּ֑ט אֵ֤ל אֱמוּנָה֙ וְאֵ֣ין עָ֔וֶל צַדִּ֥יק וְיָשָׁ֖ר הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The works of God are perfect, and all his ways are judgments: God is faithful and without any iniquity, he is just and right.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on kallio, hänen työnsä ovat laittamattomat, sillä kaikki hänen tiensä ovat oikiat; vakaa on Jumala, ilman kaikkea vääryyttä, hän on vanhurskas ja oikia.
verses.king_james: He is the Rock, his work is perfect: for all his ways are judgment: a God of truth and without iniquity, just and right is he.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccaverunt ei, et non filii ejus in sordibus :  generatio prava atque perversa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁחֵ֥ת ל֛וֹ לֹ֖א בָּנָ֣יו מוּמָ֑ם דּ֥וֹר עִקֵּ֖שׁ וּפְתַלְתֹּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have sinned against him, and are none of his children in their filth: they are a wicked and perverse generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Onko hän hänen turmellut? Ei, vaan hänen lapsensa ovat heidän häpiäpilkkunsa; se on nurja ja sekaseurainen suku.
verses.king_james: They have corrupted themselves, their spot is not the spot of his children: they are a perverse and crooked generation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæccine reddis Domino,  popule stulte et insipiens ?  numquid non ipse est pater tuus,  qui possedit te, et fecit, et creavit te ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ לְיְהֹוָה֙ תִּגְמְלוּ־זֹ֔את עַ֥ם נָבָ֖ל וְלֹ֣א חָכָ֑ם הֲלוֹא־הוּא֙ אָבִ֣יךָ קָּנֶ֔ךָ ה֥וּא עָשְׂךָ֖ וַֽיְכֹנְנֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Is this the return thou makest to the Lord, O foolish and senseless people? Is not he thy father, that hath possessed thee, and made thee, and created thee?
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinköstä te Herralle maksatte, hullu ja tyhmä kansa? Eikö hän ole sinun Isäs ja sinun Lunastajas, joka sinun luonut ja valmistanut on?
verses.king_james: Do ye thus requite the Lord, O foolish people and unwise? is not he thy father that hath bought thee? hath he not made thee, and established thee?

verses.latin_vulgate: Memento dierum antiquorum, cogita generationes singulas :  interroga patrem tuum,  et annuntiabit tibi :  majores tuos, et dicent tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹר֙ יְמ֣וֹת עוֹלָ֔ם בִּ֖ינוּ שְׁנ֣וֹת דֹּר־וָדֹ֑ר שְׁאַ֤ל אָבִ֙יךָ֙ וְיַגֵּ֔דְךָ זְקֵנֶ֖יךָ וְיֹ֥אמְרוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember the days of old, think upon every generation: ask thy father, and he will declare to thee: thy elders and they will tell thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muista muinaisia aikoja, ymmärrä vuosikaudet suvusta sukuun; kysy isältäs, ja hän ilmoittaa sinulle, ja vanhimmiltas, niin he sinulle sanovat.
verses.king_james: Remember the days of old, consider the years of many generations: ask thy father, and he will shew thee; thy elders, and they will tell thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quando dividebat Altissimus gentes,  quando separabat filios Adam,  constituit terminos populorum  juxta numerum filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּהַנְחֵ֤ל עֶלְיוֹן֙ גּוֹיִ֔ם בְּהַפְרִיד֖וֹ בְּנֵ֣י אָדָ֑ם יַצֵּב֙ גְּבֻלֹ֣ת עַמִּ֔ים לְמִסְפַּ֖ר בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: When the Most High divided the nations: when he separated the sons of Adam, he appointed the bounds of people according to the number of the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kaikkein korkein jakoi pakanat ja hajoitti ihmisten lapset, silloin hän laski kansain maan rajat, Israelin lasten luvun jälkeen.
verses.king_james: When the most High divided to the nations their inheritance, when he separated the sons of Adam, he set the bounds of the people according to the number of the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pars autem Domini, populus ejus :  Jacob funiculus hæreditatis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י חֵ֥לֶק יְהֹוָ֖ה עַמּ֑וֹ יַעֲקֹ֖ב חֶ֥בֶל נַחֲלָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord's portion is his people: Jacob the lot of his inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herran osa on hänen oma kansansa, Jakob on hänen perimisensä nuora.
verses.king_james: For the Lord’s portion is his people; Jacob is the lot of his inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Invenit eum in terra deserta,  in loco horroris, et vastæ solitudinis :  circumduxit eum, et docuit :  et custodivit quasi pupillam oculi sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִמְצָאֵ֙הוּ֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִדְבָּ֔ר וּבְתֹ֖הוּ יְלֵ֣ל יְשִׁמֹ֑ן יְסֹבְבֶ֙נְהוּ֙ יְב֣וֹנְנֵ֔הוּ יִצְּרֶ֖נְהוּ כְּאִישׁ֥וֹן עֵינֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He found him in a desert land, in a place of horror, and of vast wilderness: he led him about, and taught him: and he kept him as the apple of his eye.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän löysi hänen erämaassa ja hirmuisessa suuressa itkukorvessa. Hän vei hänen ympäri, hän opetti hänen ymmärtämään ja varjeli häntä niinkuin silmäteräänsä,
verses.king_james: He found him in a desert land, and in the waste howling wilderness; he led him about, he instructed him, he kept him as the apple of his eye.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut aquila provocans ad volandum pullos suos,  et super eos volitans,  expandit alas suas, et assumpsit eum,  atque portavit in humeris suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּנֶ֙שֶׁר֙ יָעִ֣יר קִנּ֔וֹ עַל־גּוֹזָלָ֖יו יְרַחֵ֑ף יִפְרֹ֤שׂ כְּנָפָיו֙ יִקָּחֵ֔הוּ יִשָּׂאֵ֖הוּ עַל־אֶבְרָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the eagle enticing her young to fly, and hovering over them, he spread his wings, and hath taken him and carried him on his shoulders.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin kotka kehoittelee pesäänsä ja laukuilee poikainsa päällä, levittää siipensä, ottaa kunkin heistä ja kantaa siipeinsä päällä,
verses.king_james: As an eagle stirreth up her nest, fluttereth over her young, spreadeth abroad her wings, taketh them, beareth them on her wings:

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus solus dux ejus fuit,  et non erat cum eo deus alienus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֖ה בָּדָ֣ד יַנְחֶ֑נּוּ וְאֵ֥ין עִמּ֖וֹ אֵ֥ל נֵכָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord alone was his leader: and there was no strange god with him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra yksinänsä talutti häntä, ja ei ollut hänen kanssansa muuta Jumalaa.
verses.king_james: So the Lord alone did lead him, and there was no strange god with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: constituit eum super excelsam terram,  ut comederet fructus agrorum :  ut sugeret mel de petra,  oleumque de saxo durissimo ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַרְכִּבֵ֙הוּ֙ עַל־[בָּ֣מֳתֵי] (במותי) אָ֔רֶץ וַיֹּאכַ֖ל תְּנוּבֹ֣ת שָׂדָ֑י וַיֵּנִקֵ֤הֽוּ דְבַשׁ֙ מִסֶּ֔לַע וְשֶׁ֖מֶן מֵחַלְמִ֥ישׁ צֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He set him upon high land: that he might eat the fruits of the fields, that he might suck honey out of the rock, and oil out of the hardest stone,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän vei hänen hamaan maan korkeuteen, ja ruokki hänen pellon hedelmällä, ja antoi hänen imeä hunajaa kalliosta ja öljyä kovasta kivestä,
verses.king_james: He made him ride on the high places of the earth, that he might eat the increase of the fields; and he made him to suck honey out of the rock, and oil out of the flinty rock;

verses.latin_vulgate: butyrum de armento, et lac de ovibus  cum adipe agnorum,  et arietum filiorum Basan : et hircos  cum medulla tritici,  et sanguinem uvæ biberet meracissimum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶמְאַ֨ת בָּקָ֜ר וַחֲלֵ֣ב צֹ֗אן עִם־חֵ֨לֶב כָּרִ֜ים וְאֵילִ֤ים בְּנֵֽי־בָשָׁן֙ וְעַתּוּדִ֔ים עִם־חֵ֖לֶב כִּלְי֣וֹת חִטָּ֑ה וְדַם־עֵנָ֖ב תִּשְׁתֶּה־חָֽמֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Butter of the herd, and milk of the sheep with the fat of lambs, and of the rams of the breed of Basan: and goats with the marrow of wheat, and might drink the purest blood of the grape.
verses.finnish_biblia: Voita lehmistä, ja rieskaa lampaista, ynnä karitsain lihavuuden kanssa, ja Basanin oinaat, ja lihavat kauriit, ja parhaan nisun, ja juotti hänen parhaalla viinamarjan verellä.
verses.king_james: Butter of kine, and milk of sheep, with fat of lambs, and rams of the breed of Bashan, and goats, with the fat of kidneys of wheat; and thou didst drink the pure blood of the grape.

verses.latin_vulgate: Incrassatus est dilectus, et recalcitravit :  incrassatus, impinguatus, dilatatus,  dereliquit Deum factorem suum,  et recessit a Deo salutari suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֤ן יְשֻׁרוּן֙ וַיִּבְעָ֔ט שָׁמַ֖נְתָּ עָבִ֣יתָ כָּשִׂ֑יתָ וַיִּטֹּשׁ֙ אֱל֣וֹהַּ עָשָׂ֔הוּ וַיְנַבֵּ֖ל צ֥וּר יְשֻׁעָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The beloved grew fat, and kicked: he grew fat, and thick and gross, he forsook God who made him, and departed from God his saviour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israel lihoi, tuli vikuriksi, lihavaksi, paksuksi ja väkeväksi, ja hylkäsi Jumalan, joka hänen teki, ja katsoi autuutensa kallion ylön.
verses.king_james: But Jeshurun waxed fat, and kicked: thou art waxen fat, thou art grown thick, thou art covered with fatness; then he forsook God which made him, and lightly esteemed the Rock of his salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Provocaverunt eum in diis alienis,  et in abominationibus ad iracundiam concitaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַקְנִאֻ֖הוּ בְּזָרִ֑ים בְּתוֹעֵבֹ֖ת יַכְעִיסֻֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They provoked him by strange gods, and stirred him up to anger, with their abominations.
verses.finnish_biblia: He yllyttivät hänen kiivauteen muukalaisten kautta, kauhistusten kautta vihoittivat he hänen.
verses.king_james: They provoked him to jealousy with strange gods, with abominations provoked they him to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Immolaverunt dæmoniis et non Deo,  diis quos ignorabant :  novi recentesque venerunt,  quos non coluerunt patres eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִזְבְּח֗וּ לַשֵּׁדִים֙ לֹ֣א אֱלֹ֔הַּ אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֹ֣א יְדָע֑וּם חֲדָשִׁים֙ מִקָּרֹ֣ב בָּ֔אוּ לֹ֥א שְׂעָר֖וּם אֲבֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They sacrificed to devils and not to God: to gods whom they knew not: that were newly come up, whom their fathers worshipped not.
verses.finnish_biblia: He uhrasivat perkeleille, eikä Jumalalle, jumalille, joita ei he tunteneet, vasta-uutisille, jotka ei ennen olleet, joita isänne ei peljänneet.
verses.king_james: They sacrificed unto devils, not to God; to gods whom they knew not, to new gods that came newly up, whom your fathers feared not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deum qui te genuit dereliquisti,  et oblitus es Domini creatoris tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צ֥וּר יְלָדְךָ֖ תֶּ֑שִׁי וַתִּשְׁכַּ֖ח אֵ֥ל מְחֹלְלֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast forsaken the God that begot thee, and hast forgotten the Lord that created thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kallion, joka sinun siitti, sinä hyljäsit, ja unhotit Jumalan, joka sinun loi.
verses.king_james: Of the Rock that begat thee thou art unmindful, and hast forgotten God that formed thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidit Dominus, et ad iracundiam concitatus est :  quia provocaverunt eum filii sui et filiæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥רְא יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיִּנְאָ֑ץ מִכַּ֥עַס בָּנָ֖יו וּבְנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord saw, and was moved to wrath: because his own sons and daughters provoked him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra näki sen, ja vihastui, poikainsa ja tyttäriensä kehoituksen tähden,
verses.king_james: And when the Lord saw it, he abhorred them, because of the provoking of his sons, and of his daughters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait : Abscondam faciem meam ab eis,  et considerabo novissima eorum :  generatio enim perversa est,  et infideles filii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר אַסְתִּ֤ירָה פָנַי֙ מֵהֶ֔ם אֶרְאֶ֖ה מָ֣ה אַחֲרִיתָ֑ם כִּ֣י ד֤וֹר תַּהְפֻּכֹת֙ הֵ֔מָּה בָּנִ֖ים לֹא־אֵמֻ֥ן בָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: I will hide my face from them, and will consider what their last end shall be: for it is a perverse generation, and unfaithful children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: minä peitän kasvoni heidän edestänsä, ja katson mitä heidän viimeiseltä tapahtuu; sillä se on nurja suku ja senkaltaiset lapset, joissa ei ole uskoa.
verses.king_james: And he said, I will hide my face from them, I will see what their end shall be: for they are a very froward generation, children in whom is no faith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi me provocaverunt in eo qui non erat Deus,  et irritaverunt in vanitatibus suis :  et ego provocabo eos in eo qui non est populus,  et in gente stulta irritabo illos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֚ם קִנְא֣וּנִי בְלֹא־אֵ֔ל כִּעֲס֖וּנִי בְּהַבְלֵיהֶ֑ם וַֽאֲנִי֙ אַקְנִיאֵ֣ם בְּלֹא־עָ֔ם בְּג֥וֹי נָבָ֖ל אַכְעִיסֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have provoked me with that which was no god, and have angered me with their vanities: and I will provoke them with that which is no people, and will vex them with a foolish nation.
verses.finnish_biblia: He härsyttelivät minua sen kautta, joka ei ole jumala, epäjumaluutensa kautta ovat he minun vihoittaneet ja minä vihoitan heitä jälleen sen kautta, joka ei ole kansa, tyhmällä kansalla minä heitä vihoitan.
verses.king_james: They have moved me to jealousy with that which is not God; they have provoked me to anger with their vanities: and I will move them to jealousy with those which are not a people; I will provoke them to anger with a foolish nation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ignis succensus est in furore meo,  et ardebit usque ad inferni novissima :  devorabitque terram cum germine suo,  et montium fundamenta comburet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־אֵשׁ֙ קָדְחָ֣ה בְאַפִּ֔י וַתִּיקַ֖ד עַד־שְׁא֣וֹל תַּחְתִּ֑ית וַתֹּ֤אכַל אֶ֙רֶץ֙ וִֽיבֻלָ֔הּ וַתְּלַהֵ֖ט מוֹסְדֵ֥י הָרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: A fire is kindled in my wrath, and shall burn even to the lowest hell: and shall devour the earth with her increase, and shall burn the foundations of the mountains.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä tuli on syttynyt minun vihassani, ja polttaa hamaan alimaiseen helvettiin, ja kuluttaa maan, ynnä hänen hedelmänsä kanssa, ja polttaa vuorten perustukset.
verses.king_james: For a fire is kindled in mine anger, and shall burn unto the lowest hell, and shall consume the earth with her increase, and set on fire the foundations of the mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregabo super eos mala,  et sagittas meas complebo in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַסְפֶּ֥ה עָלֵ֖ימוֹ רָע֑וֹת חִצַּ֖י אֲכַלֶּה־בָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will heap evils upon them, and will spend my arrows among them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kokoon kaiken onnettomuuden heidän päällensä, minä ammun kaikki nuoleni heihin.
verses.king_james: I will heap mischiefs upon them; I will spend mine arrows upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consumentur fame,  et devorabunt eos aves morsu amarissimo :  dentes bestiarum immittam in eos,  cum furore trahentium super terram, atque serpentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְזֵ֥י רָעָ֛ב וּלְחֻ֥מֵי רֶ֖שֶׁף וְקֶ֣טֶב מְרִירִ֑י וְשֶׁן־בְּהֵמֹת֙ אֲשַׁלַּח־בָּ֔ם עִם־חֲמַ֖ת זֹחֲלֵ֥י עָפָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall be consumed with famine, and birds shall devour them with a most bitter bite: I will send the teeth of beasts upon them, with the fury of creatures that trail upon the ground, and of serpents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nälästä heidän pitää hiukahtuman ja poltetaudilla kulutettaman, ja äkillisellä kuolemalla; minä lähetän metsän petoin hampaat heidän keskellensä, ja kyykärmeen myrkyn.
verses.king_james: They shall be burnt with hunger, and devoured with burning heat, and with bitter destruction: I will also send the teeth of beasts upon them, with the poison of serpents of the dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Foris vastabit eos gladius,  et intus pavor,  juvenem simul ac virginem,  lactentem cum homine sene.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִחוּץ֙ תְּשַׁכֶּל־חֶ֔רֶב וּמֵחֲדָרִ֖ים אֵימָ֑ה גַּם־בָּחוּר֙ גַּם־בְּתוּלָ֔ה יוֹנֵ֖ק עִם־אִ֥ישׁ שֵׂיבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Without, the sword shall lay them waste, and terror within, both the young man and the virgin, the sucking child with the man in years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ulkona pitää miekan heitä hävittämän ja sisällä huoneessa pelvon, sekä nuorukaiset että neitseet, imeväiset ja harmaapäät.
verses.king_james: The sword without, and terror within, shall destroy both the young man and the virgin, the suckling also with the man of gray hairs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixi : Ubinam sunt ?  cessare faciam ex hominibus memoriam eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֖רְתִּי אַפְאֵיהֶ֑ם אַשְׁבִּ֥יתָה מֵאֱנ֖וֹשׁ זִכְרָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I said: Where are they? I will make the memory of them to cease from among men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä sanoin: minä hävittäisin heitä, minä lakkauttaisin heidän muistonsa ihmisistä,
verses.king_james: I said, I would scatter them into corners, I would make the remembrance of them to cease from among men:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed propter iram inimicorum distuli :  ne forte superbirent hostes eorum,  et dicerent : Manus nostra excelsa,  et non Dominus, fecit hæc omnia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לוּלֵ֗י כַּ֤עַס אוֹיֵב֙ אָג֔וּר פֶּֽן־יְנַכְּר֖וּ צָרֵ֑ימוֹ פֶּן־יֹֽאמְרוּ֙ יָדֵ֣נוּ רָ֔מָה וְלֹ֥א יְהֹוָ֖ה פָּעַ֥ל כׇּל־זֹֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But for the wrath of the enemies I have deferred it: lest perhaps their enemies might be proud, and should say: Our mighty hand, and not the Lord, hath done all these things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ellen minä vihollisteni vihaa karttaisi, ettei heidän vainollisensa ylpeilisi, ja lähes sanoisi: meidän oikia kätemme on kaikki nämät tehnyt, eikä Herra.
verses.king_james: Were it not that I feared the wrath of the enemy, lest their adversaries should behave themselves strangely, and lest they should say, Our hand is high, and the Lord hath not done all this.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gens absque consilio est,  et sine prudentia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־ג֛וֹי אֹבַ֥ד עֵצ֖וֹת הֵ֑מָּה וְאֵ֥ין בָּהֶ֖ם תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are a nation without counsel, and without wisdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä se on kansa, jossa ei mitään neuvoa ole, eikä ymmärrystä.
verses.king_james: For they are a nation void of counsel, neither is there any understanding in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Utinam saperent, et intelligerent,  ac novissima providerent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ל֥וּ חָכְמ֖וּ יַשְׂכִּ֣ילוּ זֹ֑את יָבִ֖ינוּ לְאַחֲרִיתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: O that they would be wise and would understand, and would provide for their last end.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jospa he taitavaiset olisivat, niin he ymmärtäisivät ja huomaitsisivat, mitä heille viimeiseltä tapahtuu.
verses.king_james: O that they were wise, that they understood this, that they would consider their latter end!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo persequatur unus mille,  et duo fugent decem millia ?  nonne ideo, quia Deus suus vendidit eos,  et Dominus conclusit illos ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵיכָ֞ה יִרְדֹּ֤ף אֶחָד֙ אֶ֔לֶף וּשְׁנַ֖יִם יָנִ֣יסוּ רְבָבָ֑ה אִם־לֹא֙ כִּֽי־צוּרָ֣ם מְכָרָ֔ם וַֽיהֹוָ֖ה הִסְגִּירָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: How should one pursue after a thousand, and two chase ten thousand? Was it not, because their God had sold them, and the Lord had shut them up?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka yksi ajais tuhatta takaa ja kaksi karkottaisi kymmenentuhatta heistä? Eikö sentähden, että heidän kallionsa on heidät myynyt? ja Herra on heidät sulkenut?
verses.king_james: How should one chase a thousand, and two put ten thousand to flight, except their Rock had sold them, and the Lord had shut them up?

verses.latin_vulgate: Non enim est Deus noster ut dii eorum :  et inimici nostri sunt judices.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י לֹ֥א כְצוּרֵ֖נוּ צוּרָ֑ם וְאֹיְבֵ֖ינוּ פְּלִילִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For our God is not as their gods: our enemies themselves are judges.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ei ole meidän kalliomme niinkuin heidän kallionsa, ja meidän vihollisemme ovat meidän tuomarimme.
verses.king_james: For their rock is not as our Rock, even our enemies themselves being judges.

verses.latin_vulgate: De vinea Sodomorum, vinea eorum,  et de suburbanis Gomorrhæ :  uva eorum, uva fellis,  et botri amarissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־מִגֶּ֤פֶן סְדֹם֙ גַּפְנָ֔ם וּמִשַּׁדְמֹ֖ת עֲמֹרָ֑ה עֲנָבֵ֙מוֹ֙ עִנְּבֵי־ר֔וֹשׁ אַשְׁכְּלֹ֥ת מְרֹרֹ֖ת לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their vines are of the vineyard of Sodom, and of the suburbs of Gomorrha: their grapes are grapes of gall, and their clusters most bitter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä heidän viinapuunsa on Sodoman viinapuusta ja Gomorran pelloista, heidän viinamarjansa myrkylliset viinamarjat, heillä ovat karvahimmat marjat.
verses.king_james: For their vine is of the vine of Sodom, and of the fields of Gomorrah: their grapes are grapes of gall, their clusters are bitter:

verses.latin_vulgate: Fel draconum vinum eorum,  et venenum aspidum insanabile.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲמַ֥ת תַּנִּינִ֖ם יֵינָ֑ם וְרֹ֥אשׁ פְּתָנִ֖ים אַכְזָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their wine is the gall of dragons, and the venom of asps, which is incurable.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän viinansa on lohikärmeen kiukkuvahto, ja kyykärmetten hirmullinen myrkky.
verses.king_james: Their wine is the poison of dragons, and the cruel venom of asps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne hæc condita sunt apud me,  et signata in thesauris meis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹא־ה֖וּא כָּמֻ֣ס עִמָּדִ֑י חָת֖וּם בְּאוֹצְרֹתָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Are not these things stored up with me, and sealed up in my treasures?
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö se liene kätketty minun tykönäni? ja sinetillä lukittu minun tavaroissani?
verses.king_james: Is not this laid up in store with me, and sealed up among my treasures?

verses.latin_vulgate: Mea est ultio, et ego retribuam in tempore,  ut labatur pes eorum :  juxta est dies perditionis,  et adesse festinant tempora.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֤י נָקָם֙ וְשִׁלֵּ֔ם לְעֵ֖ת תָּמ֣וּט רַגְלָ֑ם כִּ֤י קָרוֹב֙ י֣וֹם אֵידָ֔ם וְחָ֖שׁ עֲתִדֹ֥ת לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Revenge is mine, and I will repay them in due time, that their foot may slide: the day of destruction is at hand, and the time makes haste to come.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun on kosto, minä kostan, heidän jalkansa pitää ajallansa kompastuman; sillä heidän kadotuksensa aika on läsnä, ja mikä heille tarjontelee, se rientää.
verses.king_james: To me belongeth vengeance, and recompence; their foot shall slide in due time: for the day of their calamity is at hand, and the things that shall come upon them make haste.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicabit Dominus populum suum,  et in servis suis miserebitur :  videbit quod infirmata sit manus,  et clausi quoque defecerunt,  residuique consumpti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יָדִ֤ין יְהֹוָה֙ עַמּ֔וֹ וְעַל־עֲבָדָ֖יו יִתְנֶחָ֑ם כִּ֤י יִרְאֶה֙ כִּֽי־אָ֣זְלַת יָ֔ד וְאֶ֖פֶס עָצ֥וּר וְעָזֽוּב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord will judge his people, and will have mercy on his servants: he shall see that their hand is weakened, and that they who were shut up have also failed, and they that remained are consumed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra tuomitsee kansansa, ja armahtaa palveliaansa; sillä hän näkee, että käsi on poissa, ja ei ole mitään tallella pidetty eikä jätetty.
verses.king_james: For the Lord shall judge his people, and repent himself for his servants, when he seeth that their power is gone, and there is none shut up, or left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dicet : Ubi sunt dii eorum,  in quibus habebant fiduciam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַ֖ר אֵ֣י אֱלֹהֵ֑ימוֹ צ֖וּר חָסָ֥יוּ בֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall say: Where are their gods, in whom they trusted?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää sanottaman: kussa heidän Jumalansa ovat? heidän kallionsa, johonka he uskalsivat?
verses.king_james: And he shall say, Where are their gods, their rock in whom they trusted,

verses.latin_vulgate: de quorum victimis comedebant adipes,  et bibebant vinum libaminum :  surgant, et opitulentur vobis,  et in necessitate vos protegant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֨ר חֵ֤לֶב זְבָחֵ֙ימוֹ֙ יֹאכֵ֔לוּ יִשְׁתּ֖וּ יֵ֣ין נְסִיכָ֑ם יָק֙וּמוּ֙ וְיַעְזְרֻכֶ֔ם יְהִ֥י עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם סִתְרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of whose victims they ate the fat, and drank the wine of their drink offerings: let them arise and help you, and protect you in your distress.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joiden lihavimmat uhrit he söivät, ja joivat viinan heidän juomauhristansa, nouskaan ne ja auttakaan teitä ja varjelkaan teitä.
verses.king_james: Which did eat the fat of their sacrifices, and drank the wine of their drink offerings? let them rise up and help you, and be your protection.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videte quod ego sim solus,  et non sit alius deus præter me :  ego occidam, et ego vivere faciam :  percutiam, et ego sanabo,  et non est qui de manu mea possit eruere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְא֣וּ ׀ עַתָּ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲנִ֤י אֲנִי֙ ה֔וּא וְאֵ֥ין אֱלֹהִ֖ים עִמָּדִ֑י אֲנִ֧י אָמִ֣ית וַאֲחַיֶּ֗ה מָחַ֙צְתִּי֙ וַאֲנִ֣י אֶרְפָּ֔א וְאֵ֥ין מִיָּדִ֖י מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: See ye that I alone am, and there is no other God besides me: I will kill and I will make to live: I will strike, and I will heal, and there is none that can deliver out of my hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nähkäät nyt, että minä itse olen, ja ei ole jumalia minun kanssani. Minä kuoletan ja teen eläväksi, minä lyön ja minä parannan, ja ei kenkään ole, joka minun käsistäni vapahtaa.
verses.king_james: See now that I, even I, am he, and there is no god with me: I kill, and I make alive; I wound, and I heal: neither is there any that can deliver out of my hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levabo ad cælum manum meam,  et dicam : Vivo ego in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אֶשָּׂ֥א אֶל־שָׁמַ֖יִם יָדִ֑י וְאָמַ֕רְתִּי חַ֥י אָנֹכִ֖י לְעֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will lift up my hand to heaven, and I will say: I live for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä nostan käteni taivaasen ja sanon: minä elän ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: For I lift up my hand to heaven, and say, I live for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si acuero ut fulgur gladium meum,  et arripuerit judicium manus mea :  reddam ultionem hostibus meis,  et his qui oderunt me retribuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־שַׁנּוֹתִי֙ בְּרַ֣ק חַרְבִּ֔י וְתֹאחֵ֥ז בְּמִשְׁפָּ֖ט יָדִ֑י אָשִׁ֤יב נָקָם֙ לְצָרָ֔י וְלִמְשַׂנְאַ֖י אֲשַׁלֵּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If I shall whet my sword as the lightning, and my hand take hold on judgment: I will render vengeance to my enemies, and repay them that hate me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin minä hion miekkani niinkuin pitkäisen leimauksen, ja minun käteni rupee rangaistukseen, niin minä koston maksan minun vihollisilleni, ja niille palkitsen, jotka minua vihaavat.
verses.king_james: If I whet my glittering sword, and mine hand take hold on judgment; I will render vengeance to mine enemies, and will reward them that hate me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inebriabo sagittas meas sanguine,  et gladius meus devorabit carnes ;  de cruore occisorum et de captivitate,  nudati inimicorum capitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁכִּ֤יר חִצַּי֙ מִדָּ֔ם וְחַרְבִּ֖י תֹּאכַ֣ל בָּשָׂ֑ר מִדַּ֤ם חָלָל֙ וְשִׁבְיָ֔ה מֵרֹ֖אשׁ פַּרְע֥וֹת אוֹיֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will make my arrows drunk with blood, and my sword shall devour flesh, of the blood of the slain and of the captivity, of the bare head of the enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä juotan nuoleni verellä, ja miekkani pitää lihaa syömän tapettuiden verestä, ja vangittuiden ja vihollisten paljastetusta päästä.
verses.king_james: I will make mine arrows drunk with blood, and my sword shall devour flesh; and that with the blood of the slain and of the captives, from the beginning of revenges upon the enemy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate, gentes, populum ejus,  quia sanguinem servorum suorum ulciscetur :  et vindictam retribuet in hostes eorum,  et propitius erit terræ populi sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַרְנִ֤ינוּ גוֹיִם֙ עַמּ֔וֹ כִּ֥י דַם־עֲבָדָ֖יו יִקּ֑וֹם וְנָקָם֙ יָשִׁ֣יב לְצָרָ֔יו וְכִפֶּ֥ר אַדְמָת֖וֹ עַמּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Praise his people, ye nations, for he will revenge the blood of his servants: and will render vengeance to their enemies, and he will be merciful to the land of his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riemuitkaat te kaikki, jotka olette hänen kansansa; sillä hän kostaa palveliainsa veren. Ja kostaa vihollisillensa, ja sovittaa maansa ja kansansa.
verses.king_james: Rejoice, O ye nations, with his people: for he will avenge the blood of his servants, and will render vengeance to his adversaries, and will be merciful unto his land, and to his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit ergo Moyses, et locutus est omnia verba cantici hujus in auribus populi, ipse et Josue filius Nun.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣א מֹשֶׁ֗ה וַיְדַבֵּ֛ר אֶת־כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֥י הַשִּׁירָֽה־הַזֹּ֖את בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י הָעָ֑ם ה֖וּא וְהוֹשֵׁ֥עַ בִּן־נֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Moses came and spoke all the words of this canticle in the ears of the people, and Josue the son of Nun.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses tuli ja puhui kaikki nämät veisun sanat tämän kansan kuullen, hän ja Josua Nunin poika.
verses.king_james: And Moses came and spake all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he, and Hoshea the son of Nun.

verses.latin_vulgate: Complevitque omnes sermones istos, loquens ad universum Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַ֣ל מֹשֶׁ֗ה לְדַבֵּ֛ר אֶת־כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה אֶל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he ended all these words, speaking to all Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses päätti kaikki nämät sanat koko Israelille,
verses.king_james: And Moses made an end of speaking all these words to all Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixit ad eos : Ponite corda vestra in omnia verba, quæ ego testificor vobis hodie : ut mandetis ea filiis vestris custodire et facere, et implere universa quæ scripta sunt legis hujus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֲלֵהֶם֙ שִׂ֣ימוּ לְבַבְכֶ֔ם לְכׇ֨ל־הַדְּבָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֧ר אָנֹכִ֛י מֵעִ֥יד בָּכֶ֖ם הַיּ֑וֹם אֲשֶׁ֤ר תְּצַוֻּם֙ אֶת־בְּנֵיכֶ֔ם לִשְׁמֹ֣ר לַעֲשׂ֔וֹת אֶת־כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֖י הַתּוֹרָ֥ה הַזֹּֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to them: Set your hearts on all the words, which I testify to you this day: which you shall command your children to observe and to do, and to fulfil all that is written in this law:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi heille: pankaat sydämeenne kaikki ne sanat, jotka minä teille tänäpänä todistin, että te käskisitte teidän lapsianne, tekemään ja pitämään kaikki tämän lain sanat.
verses.king_james: And he said unto them, Set your hearts unto all the words which I testify among you this day, which ye shall command your children to observe to do, all the words of this law.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia non incassum præcepta sunt vobis, sed ut singuli in eis viverent : quæ facientes longo perseveretis tempore in terra, ad quam, Jordane transmisso, ingredimini possidendam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֠י לֹא־דָבָ֨ר רֵ֥ק הוּא֙ מִכֶּ֔ם כִּי־ה֖וּא חַיֵּיכֶ֑ם וּבַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֗ה תַּאֲרִ֤יכוּ יָמִים֙ עַל־הָ֣אֲדָמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר אַתֶּ֜ם עֹבְרִ֧ים אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֛ן שָׁ֖מָּה לְרִשְׁתָּֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For they are not commanded you in vain, but that every one should live in them, and that doing them you may continue a long time in the land whither you are going over the Jordan to possess it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ei siinä ole teille yhtään turhaa sanaa, vaan se on teidän elämänne; ja ne sanat pitentävät teidän ikänne maan päällä, johon te menette Jordanin ylitse, omistamaan sitä.
verses.king_james: For it is not a vain thing for you; because it is your life: and through this thing ye shall prolong your days in the land, whither ye go over Jordan to possess it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen in eadem die, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה בְּעֶ֛צֶם הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses the same day, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle sinä päivänä, ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses that selfsame day, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascende in montem istum Abarim, id est, transitum, in montem Nebo, qui est in terra Moab contra Jericho : et vide terram Chanaan, quam ego tradam filiis Israël obtinendam, et morere in monte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲלֵ֡ה אֶל־הַר֩ הָעֲבָרִ֨ים הַזֶּ֜ה הַר־נְב֗וֹ אֲשֶׁר֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מוֹאָ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֣י יְרֵח֑וֹ וּרְאֵה֙ אֶת־אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן אֲשֶׁ֨ר אֲנִ֥י נֹתֵ֛ן לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לַאֲחֻזָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go up into this mountain Abarim, (that is to say, of passages,) unto mount Nebo, which is in the land of Moab over against Jericho: and see the land of Chanaan, which I will deliver to the children of Israel to possess, and die thou in the mountain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mene tälle Abarimin vuorelle, Nebon vuorelle, joka on Moabin maalla Jerihon kohdalla, ja katsele Kanaanin maata, jonka minä Israelin lapsille omaksi annan.
verses.king_james: Get thee up into this mountain Abarim, unto mount Nebo, which is in the land of Moab, that is over against Jericho; and behold the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel for a possession:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quem conscendens jungeris populis tuis, sicut mortuus est Aaron frater tuus in monte Hor, et appositus populis suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֻ֗ת בָּהָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר אַתָּה֙ עֹלֶ֣ה שָׁ֔מָּה וְהֵאָסֵ֖ף אֶל־עַמֶּ֑יךָ כַּֽאֲשֶׁר־מֵ֞ת אַהֲרֹ֤ן אָחִ֙יךָ֙ בְּהֹ֣ר הָהָ֔ר וַיֵּאָ֖סֶף אֶל־עַמָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: When thou art gone up into it thou shalt be gathered to thy people, as Aaron thy brother died in mount Hor, and was gathered to his people:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun pitää kuoleman vuorella, johonkas menet, ja koottaman kansas tykö, niinkuin veljeskin Aaron kuoli Horin vuorella, ja koottiin kansan tykö,
verses.king_james: And die in the mount whither thou goest up, and be gathered unto thy people; as Aaron thy brother died in mount Hor, and was gathered unto his people:

verses.latin_vulgate: quia prævaricati estis contra me in medio filiorum Israël ad aquas contradictionis in Cades deserti Sin : et non sanctificastis me inter filios Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר מְעַלְתֶּ֜ם בִּ֗י בְּתוֹךְ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בְּמֵֽי־מְרִיבַ֥ת קָדֵ֖שׁ מִדְבַּר־צִ֑ן עַ֣ל אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־קִדַּשְׁתֶּם֙ אוֹתִ֔י בְּת֖וֹךְ בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because you trespassed against me in the midst of the children of Israel, at the waters of contradiction, in Cades of the desert of Sin: and you did not sanctify me among the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että te olette rikkoneet minua vastaan Israelin lasten seassa, riitaveden tykönä Kadeksessa Sinin korvessa: ettette minua pyhittäneet Israelin lasten seassa.
verses.king_james: Because ye trespassed against me among the children of Israel at the waters of Meribah–Kadesh, in the wilderness of Zin; because ye sanctified me not in the midst of the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: E contra videbis terram, et non ingredieris in eam, quam ego dabo filiis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י מִנֶּ֖גֶד תִּרְאֶ֣ה אֶת־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְשָׁ֙מָּה֙ לֹ֣א תָב֔וֹא אֶל־הָאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־אֲנִ֥י נֹתֵ֖ן לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt see the land before thee, which I will give to the children of Israel, but thou shalt not enter into it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä näet maan kohdastansa; vaan ei sinun pidä siihen maahan tuleman, jonka minä Israelin lapsille annan.
verses.king_james: Yet thou shalt see the land before thee; but thou shalt not go thither unto the land which I give the children of Israel.
